name: Almosafer — Production Storefront
description: [Prod] Customer-facing travel booking — flights, hotels, and packages. Product and QA teams use this to verify live orders and storefront behavior.

name: Itinerary Builder — Custom Trips
description: [Prod] Build and edit customer trip plans. Product and ops teams use this for bespoke itineraries and booking follow-ups.

name: HK Souq — Customer Storefront
description: [Prod] Public marketplace for Hong Kong shoppers — browse, buy, and track orders. Share with customers, not internal staff workflows.

name: HK Souq — Vendor Portal
description: [Prod] Seller hub for marketplace vendors — manage listings, inventory, and order fulfillment. Partner-facing; not for internal ops.

name: Ops Dashboard — Live KPIs
description: [Internal] Monitor bookings, refunds, and daily fulfillment metrics. Ops and leadership — VPN required.

name: Support Console — Ticket Queue
description: [Internal] Log and resolve customer tickets across Almosafer and HK Souq. CS agents — VPN required.
